title: Aspidogyne boliviensis
taxonomy: Aspidogyne boliviensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae and tribe Gastrodieae. The genus Aspidogyne is a group of orchids found primarily in the Americas, and Aspidogyne boliviensis is a specific species within this genus. Aspidogyne boliviensis is native to Bolivia. This species is known to be a terrestrial orchid, which grows in the ground rather than on trees.
uses: Aspidogyne boliviensis is a species of orchid that has been traditionally used in folk medicine in Bolivia. However, there is limited scientific research on its specific medicinal uses.
